'''T'dai''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] three hundred years after the passage of the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformations]].

==Biography==
[[File:DarkJediVsJedi-Tales16.jpg|thumb|left|The duel.]]
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], T'dai was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. In [[700 BBY]], Master T'dai led a group of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] to hunt down a group of [[Bpfasshi/Legends|Bpfasshi]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]. His former [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Minch]],<ref name="CSWE" /> an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] of an [[Yoda's species/Legends|unidentified species]], was one of the Knights under his command.<ref name="HOD" />

During the chase, [[Unidentified Bpfasshi Dark Jedi|one]] of the Dark Jedi defeated Minch, but T'dai and the rest of the Jedi intervened. The Bpfasshi apprentice killed himself rather than reveal his [[Bpfasshi Dark Jedi leader|Master's]] whereabouts. T'dai then led the Jedi in pursuit of the Bpfasshi Master.<ref name="HOD" />

When the Bpfasshi master's ship landed on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]], T'dai warned Minch not to pursue him. Minch disregarded his Master's orders, cornered the Dark Jedi Master in a [[Cave of Evil/Legends|cave]], and defeated him,<ref name="HOD" /> though the dark side would taint the cave from that point onward.
